nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: CHICKEN EXTRAEMBRYONIC MEMBRANE CELL CONDITIONED MEDIA
chemicalName: Chicken Extraembryonic Membrane Cell Conditioned Media
chemicalDescription: Chicken Extraembryonic Membrane Cell Conditioned Media is the growth media removed from cultures of extraembryonic membrane cells isolated from chicken, Gallus gallus , after several days of growth. The starting media is Dulbecco's Modified Eagle Medium, and may or may not contain fetal bovine serum.
cosmeticRestriction: Please consider whether entry 419 of Annex II to the Cosmetics Regulation 1223/2009 is applicable. According to entry 419, category 1 material and Category 2 material as defined in Articles 4 and 5 respectively of Regulation (EC) No 1774/2002, and ingredients derived therefrom are prohibited in cosmetics products. Regulation (EC) No 1774/2002 has been repealed and replaced by Regulation No. 1069/2009. For Category 1 and 2 materials in Regulation No. 1069/2009, please see Article 8 and 9, respectively.
inciName: CHICKEN EXTRAEMBRYONIC MEMBRANE CELL CONDITIONED MEDIA
